title: SECIMTools: a suite of metabolomics data analysis tools.
author: Kirpich AS Ibarra M Moskalenko O Fear JM Gerken J Mi X Ashrafi A Morse AM McIntyre LM
content:
S-EPMC5910624 PMC5910624 SECIMTools: a suite of metabolomics data analysis tools.

Background

Metabolomics has the promise to transform the area of personalized medicine with the rapid development of high throughput technology for untargeted analysis of metabolites. Open access, easy to use
